_: DRAFT pending review - real misspellings observed in consumer queries (OAC CHV): terms a 1-2 character edit from their concept's CHV preferred name. Candidate stimuli for the misspelling stress set; nothing fires until reviewed.
source: Zeng QT, Tse T. Exploring and developing consumer health vocabularies. J Am Med Inform Assoc. 2006;13(1):24-9. Open Access Collaborative (OAC) CHV flatfile release 2011-02-04.
